CustomField.formula: IF( AND(leaseworks__Performed__c, NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__ResrvAllocation_F__c), NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__Historical_Event__r.leaseworks__Event_Cost__c), NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__Reserves_Cap__c)), MIN((leaseworks__ResrvAllocation_F__c * leaseworks__Historical_Event__r.leaseworks__Event_Cost__c ), leaseworks__Reserves_Cap__c ), (IF(AND(leaseworks__Performed__c, NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__ResrvAllocation_F__c), NOT ISNULL(leaseworks__Historical_Event__r.leaseworks__Event_Cost__c), ISNULL(leaseworks__Reserves_Cap__c)),(leaseworks__ResrvAllocation_F__c*leaseworks__Historical_Event__r.leaseworks__Event_Cost__c),0)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Qualified claim Amount for this task based on Required/Performed condition, Reserve cap and Reserves allocation
CustomField.label: Qualified Amount
